title: Auto Water Drop
description: Automatically places water below you if you are falling with a water bucket, saving you from fall damage. Can be toggled on or off with a hotkey.
body:
Full Description (Description):
Auto Water Drop is a simple mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 that helps you survive high falls!

When you are falling and holding a water bucket, this mod will automatically place water beneath you just before you hit the ground, saving you from fall damage.

The feature can be enabled or disabled at any time using a customizable hotkey (by default: O).

Features:
Automatic MLG: Automatically places water under you when falling with a water bucket.

Toggle Hotkey: Easily enable or disable the mod in-game with a single keypress.

No commands required: Works out-of-the-box after installation.

Survival only: The auto water drop works only in Survival mode and will not activate in Creative.

How to use:
Place the mod’s .jar file into your mods folder.

Start the game with Forge 1.20.1.

Use the hotkey (O by default) to enable or disable auto water drop.

Hold a water bucket, jump from a height, and enjoy safe landings!

Notes:
Fully client-side.

No commands or configuration needed.

Enjoy safe MLG water drops!
